assumptions: No prior Buildkite account configuration or successful use exists.
The developer has the browser and command-line tools listed by the selected path.

developer_goal: The Buildkite Starter example pipeline runs and its build completes successfully.

first_success.outcome: The Buildkite Starter example pipeline runs and its build completes successfully.
first_success.observable_signal: The pipeline build page shows a completed passing build and its job output.

route_selection.surface: Getting started with Pipelines stage 1: Starter example build
route_selection.rule: Prefer the official hosted quickstart and cURL when documented; stop at the first observable successful happy-path result.
route_selection.selected: Getting started with Pipelines stage 1: Starter example build

candidates.name: Getting started with Pipelines stage 1: Starter example build
candidates.reason: It is the specified official path to the first-success boundary.

required_path.action: Create or sign in to Buildkite and create or select an organization.
required_path.observable_result: The Buildkite organization dashboard is accessible.

required_path.action: Start Pipelines getting started stage 1 and select the Buildkite Starter example.
required_path.observable_result: A Starter example pipeline is created.

required_path.action: Run the example build as directed by the getting-started flow.
required_path.observable_result: A build is queued and runs.

required_path.action: Open the completed build and inspect its jobs and log output.
required_path.observable_result: The example build is marked passed.

prerequisites.description: A connected GitHub account or the repository access requested by the Starter flow.

external_gates.description: Repository-provider authorization may be required by the pipeline creation flow.

platform_outcomes.description: The Buildkite Starter example pipeline runs and its build completes successfully.

excluded.reason: This occurs after the selected first-success boundary.
This occurs after the selected first-success boundary.
This occurs after the selected first-success boundary.

sources.title: Create your first pipeline
evidence_supported: The Buildkite Starter example pipeline runs and its build completes successfully.
The pipeline build page shows a completed passing build and its job output.

uncertainties.question: Does fresh-account UI wording differ from the documented Create your first pipeline path?
uncertainties.impact: A human should judge minor navigation differences without moving the first-success boundary.
